title: Gluten-Free Mascarpone Delight
description: A rich and creamy dessert that's perfect for warm weather. This gluten-free mascarpone delight is a refreshing treat that's sure to please.
instructions: Crush the Monsoon Delight cookies in a food processor until finely ground.
In a large mixing bowl, beat the mascarpone with an electric mixer until smooth.
Add the honey, lemon zest, and vanilla extract to the mascarpone and mix until well combined.
Gently fold in the crushed cookies until a uniform mixture is formed.
Spoon the mixture into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Top with fresh berries and refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow the flavors to meld.
